title: buildah.spec file in contrib no longer builds cleanly
body:
**Description**
`rpmbuild` using the buildah.spec in `contrib` from latest release `v1.12.0` `(6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9)`  no longer builds cleanly, due to what looks like an issue with dependencies from CNI.

There are also some issues with the changelog formatting (should not contain commas) and the date of one of the entries (shown as warning below). Once these items are cleaned up in the spec, the following error is the result.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**
1. `yum-builddep -y buildah.spec`
2. `rpmbuild -ba buildah.spec`


**Describe the results you received:**
Following build failure:
```
+ rpmbuild -ba /root/rpmbuild/SPECS/buildah.spec
warning: bogus date in %changelog: Tue Mar 28 2019 Tom Sweeney <tsweeney@redhat.com> 1.7.2-1
Executing(%prep): /bin/sh -e /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.A3LqlU
+ umask 022
+ cd /root/rpmbuild/BUILD
+ cd /root/rpmbuild/BUILD
+ rm -rf buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9
+ /usr/bin/gzip -dc /root/rpmbuild/SOURCES/buildah-6cc4656.tar.gz
+ /usr/bin/tar -xf -
+ STATUS=0
+ '[' 0 -ne 0 ']'
+ cd buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9
+ /usr/bin/chmod -Rf a+rX,u+w,g-w,o-w .
+ /usr/bin/git init -q
+ /usr/bin/git config user.name rpm-build
+ /usr/bin/git config user.email '<rpm-build>'
+ /usr/bin/git add .
+ /usr/bin/git commit -q -a --author 'rpm-build <rpm-build>' -m 'buildah-1.12.0 base'
+ exit 0
Executing(%build): /bin/sh -e /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.0rdfl3
+ umask 022
+ cd /root/rpmbuild/BUILD
+ cd buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9
+ mkdir _build
+ pushd _build
~/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9/_build ~/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9
+ mkdir -p src/github.com/containers
++ dirs +1 -l
+ ln -s /root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9 src/github.com/containers/buildah
+ popd
~/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9
+ mv vendor src
++ pwd
++ pwd
+ export GOPATH=/root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9/_build:/root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9:/usr/share/gocode
+ GOPATH=/root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9/_build:/root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9:/usr/share/gocode
+ make all GIT_COMMIT=6cc4656
GO111MODULE=on go build -mod=vendor -ldflags '-X main.GitCommit=6cc4656 -X main.buildInfo=1577404348 -X main.cniVersion=v0.7.1'  -o buildah -tags "seccomp selinux    " ./cmd/buildah
build github.com/containernetworking/cni/pkg/version: cannot load github.com/containernetworking/cni/pkg/version: open /root/rpmbuild/BUILD/buildah-6cc46567d1c7011bc99ac99ecc6239f2d3df0aa9/vendor/github.com/containernetworking/cni/pkg/version: no such file or directory
make: *** [binary] Error 1
error: Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.0rdfl3 (%build)


RPM build errors:
    bogus date in %changelog: Tue Mar 28 2019 Tom Sweeney <tsweeney@redhat.com> 1.7.2-1
    Bad exit status from /var/tmp/rpm-tmp.0rdfl3 (%build)
```

**Describe the results you expected:**
Clean `rpmbuild` with resulting rpm binary file.

comments.body:
@pixdrift, long time, good to see you and thanks for the issue.

@lsm5 PTAL

Looks like there is a clean build here on the CentOS CBS setup by @lsm5:
https://cbs.centos.org/koji/buildinfo?buildID=27823

Issue with this RPM build too, added details here:
https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues/1923
@pixdrift I believe this is working in master now, reopen if I am mistaken.
